title: stylocoryna canarica
intro: Stylocoryna canarica, also known as the Canary Island Stylocoryna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, thanks to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stylocoryna canarica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Stylocoryna canarica are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
